creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Thanks for your quick update!

But unfortunately, the uploaded patch couldn't be applicable in-place.
I'll upload hand-modified one shortly.

And even with fixed patch, this failes to build due to checksum mismatch.

     ===== Quote =====
=> pkg_rmleaves-20231217.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://files.wittig.name/pkg_rmleaves/pkg_rmleaves-20231217.tar.gz
